### Lead Software Engineer | Cloud Architect | AI & Engineering

---

I’m a **Lead Software Engineer** and **Cloud Architect** with nearly **7 years of experience** building scalable, event-driven enterprise systems. I specialize in translating complex business requirements into robust, cloud-native microservice architectures that improve delivery speed, resilience, and scale.

## 🏗️ Engineering & Leadership Impact

- **Enterprise Architecture:** Designed and delivered **70+ microservice ecosystems** using Event-Driven Architecture with Kafka/PubSub, achieving **99.95% success rates** through DLQs and retry patterns.
- **Cloud-Native Infrastructure:** Engineered highly available, containerized runtime environments across **GCP** and **AWS** using **Kubernetes** and **Docker**.
- **Innovation & AI:** Exploring **Agentic AI Systems**, building high-impact POCs, and authoring strategic architecture blueprints for enterprise adoption.
- **Engineering Excellence:** Built reusable **Microservice Starter Kits** that reduced boilerplate by **30%**, while mentoring junior engineers in **System Design**, **TDD**, and backend reliability.
